titleStmt.title: SII 17.754: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 754. (A.R. No. 697 of 1904.) TIRUPPĀṞKAḌAL, WALAJAPET TALUK, NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the east wall of the first prākāra in the Kharapurīśvara temple.

The date discussed here points to the identity of the King Ariyaṇṇa-Uḍaiyar with Harihara II. The details of date viz. Śaka 1304, Dundubhi, śu. 14, Sunday, Śadaiyam will correspond to 1382 A.D. August 24 if the month is Siṁha as indicated by the combination of the paksha, thithi and star. The thithi ended however at ·45 of the previous day.

This inscription records the gift of land as Kāṇiyāṭchi, by the trustees (sthānattār) of the Tirukkarapuram-uḍaiya nāyaṉār temple at Tiruppāṟkaḍal, to the inhabitants of Tiruppāṟkaḍal in return for contributions towards the expenses of the services to the deity.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . śrīmaṉmahāmaṇṭaleśvaraṉ harirāyavipāṭaṉ pāṣaikkut tappuvarāyara kaṇṭa
ṉ muvarāyara kaṇṭaṉ pūṟuvatekṣiṇa paccima camuttiṟātipati śrī virapukkaṇa Uṭaiyar
kumārar Ariyaṇṇa Uṭaiyar pṛtivirājya(ya)m paṇṇi Aruḷāniṉṟa śakāptam Āyirattu
muṉṉūṟṟu nāliṉmel cellāniṉṟa tuntupi saṅvatssarattu pūrvapakṣa caturddeciyum nāyaṟṟukiḻa
maiyum peṟṟa cataiyattu nāḷ jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu tāmaṟ koṭṭattu vaṭakarai nāṭṭu
tiruppāṟkaṭal Uṭaiyār tirukkarapuramuṭaiya nāyaṉār koyil tāṉattārom Iv Ūrāl Ūr(ā)varil puṉṉai kiḻār
ātittatevar pūpālarāyarum cempūruṭaiyār mutalippiḷḷaiyum Iluppai pākkiḻār vicaiyar villavarāyarum
kuṇanalluḻāṉ malaipperumāḷum poṉṉuḻāṉ mallinātarum Uḷḷiṭṭa Ūr(āra)
vaṟkku kalluveṭṭi kuṭuttapaṭi Iv Ūrāl Iṉṉāyaṉār tirunāmattukkāṇi Āṉa nilat
tile mutal Aṭaṅka Iṟaiyiliyāṉa nilam nikki niṉṟa nilattile tāṅkaḷ veṇṭiṉa nilam kai
kkoṇṭu kāṇiyāṭciyāka kaṭavarkaḷākavum Itil Ūra Ilāmale cantrātittavarai
yum tāṅkaḷe Aṉupavittukkoḷḷakkaṭavarkaḷākavum Iṉṉāyaṉāṟku tirunāmattuk kāṇippeṟṟukkup
ṭṭiṉa mutalukku paṇṭārattār nāṭṭu mariyātikkuk kūṭṭiṉa mutalile kāṇippeṟ ṟukku kamuku Oṉṟu
kkumāka paṇaviḻukkāṭu Uḷḷa mutal kaḻittukkoṇṭu Inta mutal Iṉṉāyaṉārkku tiruccelavu
m Ākavum Ippaṭikku cantirātittavaraiyum naṭakkak kaṭavatākavum Ip paṭikku cam
matittu kallu veṭṭik kuṭuttom tiruppāṟkaṭal Ūrava(ra)ril puṉṉaikiḻār Ātittatevar pūpālarāyarum
cempūruṭaiyār mutalippiḷḷaiyum Iruppaipākkiḻār vicaiyar villavarāyarum kuṇanalluḻār
malaipperumāḷum poṉṉuḻār mallinātarum Uḷḷiṭṭa Ūravaṟkku Uṭaiyār tiruk karapuram Uṭaiya
ṉāyaṉārkoyil tāṉattārom vatu vaṉ nāṟpatteṇṇāyira paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ip
paṭikku Ivai Āriyateva nampi vaṇṭāḻai Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai tevar kaṇṭaka paramecura paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu
Ippaṭikku Ivai Ēkāmparanātaṉ cantiracekara paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai tirucciṟṟampala nampi Eḻuttu
Ippaṭikku Ivai tirucciṟṟampalanātar Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai koyil kaṇakku maṅkalamuṭaiyā
ṉ piḷḷai toṇṭamāṉār Eḻuttu Ivai Eṉakku nallāṉ coḻakoṉār Eḻuttu Ivai
ḻuttu ṇāuṭaiyāṉ Ivai Āṟai Aṉantapaṉmaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai Āṟai vicaiyapaṉmaṉ
Eḻuttu Ivai ṉ Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 17.754 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
